steps.title: Read the histogram
steps.content: The bars cover length intervals of width 50 starting at 0. The rightmost nonempty bar covers values from 200 up to, but not including, 250.

steps.title: Locate the maximum
steps.content: Because the rightmost nonempty bar is $[200, 250)$ and it contains 5 values, the maximum length in the data set must be at least 200 feet and less than 250 feet.

steps.title: Eliminate the answer choices
steps.content:
• A 68 is far below the last bar, so it cannot be the maximum.
  • B 118 is still below 200.
  • C 168 is still below 200.
  • D 218 falls in the rightmost nonempty bar, where the maximum must be.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
